pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing the task description and verifier file extraction path.

privileged_info_summary: The dive data originates from real Subsurface sample data (SampleDivesV2.ssrf), downloaded from the official repository during environment setup. There are 4 real dives at 'Sund Rock'. The correct longest dive occurred on 2010-12-04 with a duration of 23:00 min. The correct deepest dive occurred on 2010-12-05 with a depth of 12.19 m (often displayed as 12.2 m). A critical bug exists in the task's setup_task.sh ground-truth computation script (compute_gt.py): it fails to parse depth values correctly because it searches for the <depth> tag as a direct child of <dive> instead of within <divecomputer>. This results in a computed depth of 0.0 m for all dives, causing the first dive (2010-12-04) to be incorrectly identified as the deepest. An agent that correctly identifies the deepest dive from the Subsurface UI (2010-12-05, 12.2m) will incorrectly fail the depth evaluation in the verifier.
